name: Katherine's Amazing Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9-inch X 12-inch (24 X 30cm) cake pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C).
3. Sift together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Pour over the dry ingredients and mix well until smooth: cooking oil, vanilla, vinegar, and cold water.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F (180°C) for 35 minutes.
The cake is ready when it springs back to the touch or a toothpick comes out clean.
